In the past week, I've built a project in:
- React Native
- Native Swift, Native Kotlin
- Flutter

My conclusion is that:
- React Native takes forever to build from a clean slate
- Native Swift and Kotlin are better, but can also take time

Hot take: Building a native Swift iOs app might now be easier than building a website.
